feature_explanations.explanation: Feature f705 appears most consistent with self-reference and identity markers.

top_stimuli.text: As far as this consciousness can be extended backwards, so far reaches the identity of that person.

top_stimuli.ref: Hume, A Treatise of Human Nature
top_stimuli.text: When my perceptions are removed for any time, I am insensible of myself.

top_stimuli.ref: William Blake, The Marriage of Heaven and Hell
top_stimuli.text: If the doors of perception were cleansed every thing would appear to man as it is, infinite.
Man is spirit. But what is spirit? Spirit is the self.
